author: feral-core
description: Spawn parallel child agents to handle multiple tasks concurrently, then return structured results.

endpoints.description: Run one or more tasks in parallel using isolated subagent contexts with tool access.

params.name: tasks
params.description: Array of task strings to run in parallel

params.name: task
params.description: Single task string (alternative to tasks array)

params.name: goal
params.description: Shared goal/context prepended to each task

params.name: max_workers
params.description: Parallel worker cap (default up to 3, max 6)

params.name: max_iterations
params.description: Reasoning loops per subagent (default up to 8, max 12)

endpoints.returns_description: Structured per-task results with success/error details
